title: penstemon neotericus
intro: Penstemon neotericus, also known as the Desert Penstemon or Narrow-leaved Penstemon, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Penstemon genus. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Penstemon neotericus has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cardiovascular problems. In herbal preparations, Penstemon neotericus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
